title: Christmas Ribbon Set – 3 Pack (10m Each Roll, 30m Total) – Red, Cream & Jute Festive Gift Wrapping Ribbons for Christmas Presents, Crafts, Baubles & Tree Decorations
features: ELEGANT 3-PACK RIBBON SET – Includes 3 rolls of premium Christmas ribbon, each 10 metres long and 10mm wide, giving you 30 metres total to decorate, wrap, and craft with ease.

FESTIVE GIFT WRAPPING – Add a luxury touch to your Christmas presents. The cream ribbon features a shimmering gold “Merry Christmas” message, the red ribbon is decorated with metallic gold hearts, and the jute ribbon is patterned with classic white snowflakes.

CLASSIC & TRADITIONAL DESIGNS – A stylish mix of rustic jute with snowflakes, festive red with golden hearts, and cream with gold lettering makes this set versatile for both modern and traditional Christmas décor.
MULTI-PURPOSE USE – Ideal for gift wrapping, Christmas crafts, wreath making, card decorating, and hanging baubles or ornaments on your tree. A must-have for creative festive projects.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS – Strong yet flexible ribbon that ties neatly, cuts easily, and holds shape without fraying. Perfect for creating professional-looking bows and decorations.
description: Pack of 3 rolls of Christmas ribbon including red, cream and jute coloured.
